node.title: How is work culture at Uber Bangalore?

topic.title: How is work culture at Uber Bangalore?

post.content: I have an SDE 2 (L4) offer at Uber India (Bangalore). [Haven\'t got the offer letter yet so don\'t know the numbers yet].\nI am currently at Microsoft and my major concerns are WLB, Culture and flexible WFH, If someone here is a Uber or has recently joined uber, can you please tell how is your experience, is it manageable?\nThank you.
Did you got the offer from 31st drive or you have given your interview before that ?
Hey, I have an interview with them this week. It would be really helpful if you can share your interview experience
Can I get a referral at MSFT bro ?
